# Complete 585 Report Wireframe Specification

Functional, TallyPrime-inspired accounting/reporting wireframes for an original Indian MSME accounting product. Not a pixel-perfect copy of any proprietary software. Each report below has a dedicated ASCII wireframe, path, columns, actions, F12 configuration, drill path, empty state, and implementation notes.

## Master Layout Templates

- Template A - Hierarchical Statement: financial statements, statutory computations, grouped summaries.
- Template B - Monthly/Columnar: monthly registers, period comparisons, trend reports.
- Template C - Transaction/Register: flat voucher lists, logs, audit rows, transaction books.
- Template D - Matrix/Comparison: ageing, reconciliation, targets, rate-wise/state-wise analysis.
- Template E - Modal/Panel: filters, configure screens, export/print/share panels, status overlays.

# Per-Report Wireframes

## Gateway, Navigation & Global Report Shells

### 1. Gateway of Business
- **Menu Path:** Gateway > Gateway of Business
- **Layout Template:** Custom Navigation Panel
- **Header Fields:** Company name, report name, active date/period, active view, selected group/ledger/GSTIN/employee where applicable.
- **Table Columns:** Report Group | Report Name | Shortcut | Status | Last Used
- **Wireframe:**
```text
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
|001. Gateway of Business                                       Company: Demo Co | FY: 2026-27 |F2: Period           |
|Gateway, Navigation & Global Report Shells                                                    |F3: Company          |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
|Report Group                 | Report Name   | Shortcut      | Status        | Last Used      |F12: Configure       |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|E: Export            |
|Capital Account              | 8,50,000      | 0             | 0             | 8,50,000       |P: Print             |
|Sundry Debtors               | 80,000        | 58,500        | 10,000        | 1,28,500       |                     |
|Sales Accounts               | 0             | 0             | 24,50,000     | 24,50,000      |                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
|Q: Quit | Space: Select | Enter: Drill Down | R: Remove Line | U: Restore Line | F12: Configu~|                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
```
- **Right Action Rail:** F2: Period; F3: Company; F12: Configure; E: Export; P: Print
- **Bottom Shortcut Bar:** Q Quit; Space Select; Enter Drill Down; Esc Back; R Remove Line; U Restore Line; F12 Configure.
- **F12 Configure Options:** Show opening balance: Yes/No; Show transactions: Yes/No; Show closing balance: Yes/No; Format: Condensed/Detailed; Sort method: Default/Name/Amount.
- **Drill-down Path:** Menu tile -> Report group -> Report -> Saved/configured view.
- **Empty/Exception State:** No vouchers/masters found for selected period; show period, company, filter reset, and create/import action.
- **Developer Notes:** Implement with report_config id `001`, module `gateway`, template `Custom Navigation Panel`, server-side filters for period/company, and export adapters for PDF/Excel/CSV/JSON. Preserve keyboard-first navigation and audit-safe drilldown.

- **Table Columns:** Item/Group | Godown/Batch | Opening | Inward | Outward | Closing | Value/Status
- **Wireframe:**
```text

|221. Stock Summary                                             Company: Demo Co | FY: 2026-27 |F2: Period           |
|Inventory, Stock & Godown Reports                                                             |F3: Company          |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
|Item/Group             | Godown/B~ | Opening   | Inward    | Outward   | Closing   | Value/St~|F12: Configure       |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|E: Export            |
|Mobile Charger         | Main/B-01 | 50 pcs    | 30 pcs    | 20 pcs    | 60 pcs    | 90,000   |P: Print             |
|Earphones              | Main/B-02 | 70 pcs    | 50 pcs    | 25 pcs    | 95 pcs    | 66,405   |B: Basis/Valuation   |
|USB Cable              | Branch    | 10 pcs    | 0         | 15 pcs    | -5 pcs    | Negative |                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
|Q: Quit | Space: Select | Enter: Drill Down | R: Remove Line | U: Restore Line | F12: Configu~|                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+---------------------+
```
- **Right Action Rail:** F2: Period; F3: Company; F12: Configure; E: Export; P: Print; B: Basis/Valuation
- **Bottom Shortcut Bar:** Q Quit; Space Select; Enter Drill Down; Esc Back; R Remove Line; U Restore Line; F12 Configure.
- **F12 Configure Options:** Show quantities: Yes/No; Show rates: Yes/No; Show values: Yes/No; Valuation method: Average/FIFO/Last Purchase; Include zero/negative stock: Yes/No.
- **Drill-down Path:** Group/Godown/Item -> Stock item ledger -> Voucher -> Batch/godown allocation.
- **Empty/Exception State:** No stock movement for selected filters; keep headers visible and show zero/negative stock toggles.
- **Developer Notes:** Implement with report_config id `221`, module `inventory`, template `Template A`, server-side filters for period/company, and export adapters for PDF/Excel/CSV/JSON. Preserve keyboard-first navigation and audit-safe drilldown.
